query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.phone, p.userId, p.contractStatus, p.createdAt
FROM partners p
WHERE 
  (p.name LIKE '%test%' 
  OR p.phone LIKE '%test%'
  OR p.name LIKE '%测试%'
  OR p.phone LIKE '%000%')
  AND p.phone NOT IN ('13860029testtest', '13800138013')
ORDER BY p.id;
